problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
